name: Kiwifruit & Strawberries
recipeIngredient: 2 Kiwifruit, peeled - concentrated with 1 tbsp juice
recipeInstructions:
Raspberries, blueberries or blackberries may be substituted for the strawberries.
Peel kiwifruit and slice into thin rounds. Arrange on dessert plates.
Wash, hull and slice the strawberries and arrange them over the kiwifruit. Drizzle orange juice over each dish and top with pine nuts.
